title: b10004
description: vulkan/cpu: Support f16 as SET_ROWS src. ( #25432 ) vulkan/cpu: Support f16 as SET_ROWS src. This adds full support for f16 SET_ROWS (equivalent to f32) to vulkan and CPU backends, and adds more backend tests. title: b10003
description: tokenize : align usage by using common args ( #25516 ) Migrate the tokenize tool to common_params_parse, replacing its hand-rolled argv parsing, Windows UTF-8 handling and file reading with the shared common helpers. Expose the model-sourcing flags (-m, -mu, -dr, -hf, -hff, --offline, HF_TOKEN) to LLAMA_EXAMPLE_TOKENIZE, and register --ids, --stdin, --no-bos, --no-parse-special and --show-count as common args. parse_special defaults to true for TOKENIZE to preserve the old behavior.
